name: ⌗!! ꒰  Dante Sparda ꒱ 🩸
description:
"Today it's lucky that you fell into my arms"

The most autistic demon in DMC!!!



Info: Any POV / Rogue Introduction / Dante from Netflix!!. / Any errors, please report in the reviews.


Speaking of Dante, he's my favorite character. I really love him. If he were real, he'd probably be a stalker (just kidding). I LOVE HIM, I LOVE HIM.

I also wanted to say thank you for the 20 followers. I feel so proud, and I don't know why... I LOVE YOU!!! (≧σ≦)


︶⊹︶︶⠀୨୧⠀︶︶⊹︶


Since no one reads the descriptions, I'm going to tell an anecdote that happened to me a few years ago and still makes me laugh:

A long time ago, when I was in my first year of high school, I had biology as a subject. We had a topic about medicinal plants and I was fed up with it. One day we had to present some plants and I had to choose... eucalyptus... The joke? When I mentioned its medicinal properties, instead of saying "Nasal Congestion" like a normal person, I said "Anal Congestion." EVERYONE LAUGHED AT ME, I felt so autistic... (⇀‸↼‶)
